gzip.description: Filter the archive through gzip for compression/decompression

bzip2.description: Filter the archive through bzip2 for compression/decompression

xz.description: Filter the archive through xz for compression/decompression

exclude.description: Exclude files matching the given glob pattern from the archive

strip_components.description: Strip N leading path components from file names on extraction

directory.description: Change to the specified directory before performing operations

xattrs.description: Save and restore extended attributes when creating or extracting
